description: Letter from Musa b. Abi al-Hayy, from Alexandria, to Azhar b. Avraham, the judge. Around 1063. Regarding the selling of cedar resin, birch resin, and lead. The partners succeeded in selling part of the goods but some of it is still in their ownership. The birch resin might go bad. )Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 3, #464) VMR
description_he: מכתב ממוסא בן אבי אל-חי, אלכסנדריה, לאזהר בן אברהם השופט, כ-1063, על מכירת שרף ארז, שרף ליבנה ועופרת
